criteria.label: Classify a given method as filter, wrapper, or embedded.
criteria.example: Given mutual information ranking, RFE with SVM, and LassoCV, label them filter, wrapper, and embedded respectively with one-sentence justification each.

criteria.label: Run SelectKBest with mutual information and report how many features were kept.
criteria.example: On `load_breast_cancer`, use `SelectKBest(mutual_info_classif, k=10)`, print `X_selected.shape[1] == 10` and the sum of `get_support()`.

criteria.label: Implement leakage-safe selection with Pipeline and cross-validation.
criteria.example: Build `Pipeline([('sel', SelectKBest(mutual_info_classif, k=15)), ('clf', LogisticRegression())])` and report mean `cross_val_score(..., cv=5, scoring='roc_auc')`.

criteria.label: Compare held-out performance of full features vs RFE-selected subset.
criteria.example: Split breast cancer data 80/20, fit `RFE(LogisticRegression(), n_features_to_select=10)` on train only, evaluate test accuracy vs a baseline trained on all features.
